highlights.text: For the last three days, we saw this and for the first time in weeks my “Bear Case” triggered three days in a row.
I stated on Monday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins below 6699-6705 We lost 6699, and sold to low of day to 6670s, before returning to 6699 by the close.
I stated yesterday that: “Bear case tomorrow: It resumes below 6683.” Overnight we lost 6683, and down we went to 6631 by 10am.
Remember that in ES every “elevator down” sell, resolves in a squeeze.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll talk the distinction between my core setup (The Failed Breakdown) and its more complex, messy, but prevalent sibling (The Level Reclaim).

post_title: Bulls Try To Buy The Three Day Dip. Can They Stick It This Time? Sept 26 Plan
